title: Minerva
description: Highly restrictive modpack around Create and slow progression. Items and blocks are mostly locked behind a research tree and guided through with a quest system
body:
# Description

Minerva is a modpack designed to slow down the typical progression. It encurages building structures early on and designing complex factories in later parts of the game.

# Target Audience

This modpack is not designed to be played through quickly. Therefore players seeking fast progression and many different mods may not be satisfied with this modpack. Players looking for an rebalanced and guided approach of the Create mod and having the time needed to focus world building will find what they are looking for.
